question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING sum(T3.killed)  >  10
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.id, T1.nm FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.lost_in_batt JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.caus_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id, T1.nm HAVING SUM(T3.kill) > 10;
raw_response: SELECT T1.id, T1.nm FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.lost_in_batt JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.caus_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id, T1.nm HAVING SUM(T3.kill) > 10;
